title: tephrosia inandensis
intro: Tephrosia inandensis, also known as Inandi, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia inandensis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve kidney function. Tephrosia inandensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
